reviews.comment:
Es a mi entender la estación de servicio más limpia q conocí. Los BAÑOS IMPECABLES. felicitaciones

(Translated by Google)
In my opinion, it's the cleanest gas station I've ever been to. The restrooms are spotless. Congratulations!

reviews.comment:
No tienen menú ni lista de precios a la vista. Pedi un te con limón y no tenían limón. No habia licuados...  Pedi un te de hierbas con 4 medialunas que estaban quemadas y no pude comer. Un desastre.  Asi atienden al turista. Los baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a menu or price list displayed. I ordered lemon tea and they didn't have any lemons. They didn't have smoothies either... I ordered herbal tea with four croissants that were burnt and I couldn't eat them. A disaster. This is how they treat tourists. The bathrooms were clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13471578260485529773/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlMWNDT2JnEAE
